name: Xwizard DLL Side-Loading Detected
description: Detects suspicious execution of `xwizard.exe` (Extensible Wizard Host) from non-standard or unusual directories. This activity can indicate an attempt by adversaries to perform DLL side-loading, where `xwizard.exe` is coerced into loading a malicious DLL placed in the same directory as the executable, bypassing application whitelisting and achieving defense evasion.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious `xwizard.exe` execution detected, potentially indicating DLL side-loading. Event Details: **Image** {Image}, **Command Line** {CommandLine}, **Parent Image** {ParentImage}, **User** {User}, **Computer Name** {ComputerName}, **Rule Name** {RuleName}. Investigate whether this execution from a non-standard directory is a legitimate action or an attempt to load a malicious DLL.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The command line used to execute xwizard.exe.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The parent process that launched xwizard.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: Sysmon specific field for rule matching.
